title: xyris coutensis
intro: Xyris coutensis, also known as Coutinho's yellow eye grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. It is native to Brazil and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, offering health benefits in alleviating respiratory problems. Xyris coutensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
